structure: A protagonist travels to {region} and discovers a hidden village practice involving {entity}.
Night shifts at the {region} construction site reveal the true reason why the water level never drops below the {entity}'s mark.
An urban explorer in {region} finds a sealed talisman on an old mountain path, accidentally releasing a {entity} trapped since the Joseon era.
A police officer transferred to the remote {region} notices that the elderly residents all have the same scar from a {entity} encounter years ago.
